stages.spec:
## Goal
Tune ISR revalidation windows on data-backed pages that already have `export const revalidate` but are set too aggressively (60–300s) for how often the underlying data actually changes. Pure page-constant tweaks — zero behavioural risk, immediately deployable.

## Why this will be good
Today every project detail page regenerates every 5 minutes even though project content (brochures, prices, floor plans) changes a few times per week. We're paying for upstream API calls and ISR regenerations we don't need. Bumping TTLs to match reality cuts Fastify/Render load on the origin API by 5-10x with zero user-visible change (ISR serves stale-while-revalidate so no one waits). `/search` is actually miscategorised — it takes user-typed queries, so it must be dynamic, not ISR-cached.

Production-ready: no loading state changes, no error handling changes, no UX changes. Just constants.

Benchmark: Vercel's own marketing site uses 1h+ ISR on content pages. Stripe docs use 1h. Our 60s was tuned for 'new inventory appears quickly' but inventory changes are rare and a manual `revalidatePath` or 5min window in the next stage can handle bursts.

## Files to touch

For each file below, change ONLY the `export const revalidate = N;` line. Do not touch logic, imports, or components.

| File | Current | New | Rationale |
|---|---|---|---|
| `src/app/[locale]/page.tsx` | 120 | 300 | Homepage — featured projects/listings/news change daily at most |
| `src/app/[locale]/off-plan/page.tsx` | 60 | 300 | Off-plan list — new projects appear weekly |
| `src/app/[locale]/buy/page.tsx` | 60 | 300 | Listings list — new stock a few times/day |
| `src/app/[locale]/rent/page.tsx` | 60 | 300 | Listings list — same |
| `src/app/[locale]/project/[slug]/page.tsx` | 300 | 1800 | Project detail — content changes rarely, pricing updates maybe weekly |
| `src/app/[locale]/property/[slug]/page.tsx` | 300 | 1800 | Property detail — same |
| `src/app/[locale]/news/[slug]/page.tsx` | 600 | 3600 | News article body never changes after publish |
| `src/app/[locale]/news/page.tsx` | 600 | 900 | News list — small bump to 15min |
| `src/app/[locale]/construction-updates/page.tsx` | 60 | 600 | Construction updates posted weekly |
| `src/app/[locale]/construction-updates/[slug]/page.tsx` | 60 | 600 | Same |

**Leave unchanged (already correct):**
- `communities/page.tsx`, `communities/[slug]/page.tsx` — 3600 ✓
- `developers/page.tsx`, `developers/[slug]/page.tsx` — 3600 ✓
- `pulse/page.tsx` — 300 (market data should be fresh) ✓

**Fix miscategorised:** `src/app/[locale]/search/page.tsx` currently has `export const revalidate = 60;`. This page takes user query params (`?q=...&intent=buy`) — ISR caching a per-user search result is wrong. Replace with `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';`.

## Acceptance criteria

1. `npx tsc --noEmit` passes.
2. `npm run build` completes successfully — Next build output must show each page with the updated `Revalidate` column.
3. Dev server restart at http://localhost:3000 → every touched route loads without error.
4. `/search?q=dubai` still returns fresh results on every reload (no stale cache behaviour).
5. No other lines in these files change. Diff should be exactly 11 lines modified, all of them `export const revalidate = N;` or `export const dynamic = ...;`.

## Out of scope for this stage
- `generateStaticParams` for slug routes (separate stage if user wants it later).
- Adding `next: { revalidate }` to individual `serverFetch` calls.
- `force-static` on purely-static pages (about/contact/services/valuation) — covered in a future stage if wanted.
- `next.config.ts` headers — Vercel defaults are already optimal for `_next/static`.
- Any behaviour change, component change, or new API call.

## DEV notes
- Do NOT modify `src/lib/api.ts`. React.cache() dedup there is already correct.
- Do NOT add `export const revalidate` to auth-gated pages (profile, admin, signin, reset-password) — they correctly have `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` already.
- Do NOT add `export const revalidate` to `src/app/[locale]/about/page.tsx`, `contact/page.tsx`, `services/page.tsx`, `valuation/page.tsx` — they're client components (`'use client'`) or have no data fetch, so ISR is a no-op; leaving them static is correct.
- When you edit `/search/page.tsx`, remove the `export const revalidate = 60;` line entirely before adding `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';` — don't leave both.
stages.demoPath: 1. Local: `npm run build` — check that the build output table shows the new Revalidate values per route. 2. Deploy to Vercel staging. 3. Hit https://staging.binayahhub.com/project/sensia-by-beyond — inspect response headers: `x-vercel-cache: HIT` on second request within 30min. 4. Hit /search?q=dubai — headers should show `x-vercel-cache: MISS` or dynamic rendering (no ISR caching of user queries).

devReport.summary: Tuned ISR TTLs on 10 pages (120s→300s homepage, 60s→300s listing/off-plan, 300s→1800s detail pages, 600s→3600s news articles, 600s→900s news list, 60s→600s construction); flipped /search from revalidate=60 to force-dynamic

designBrief.direction: no aesthetic direction needed for this scope

reviewerReport.summary: skipped — trivial diff (22 lines, no risky paths, only ISR constant changes)

qaReport.designSkipReason: no frontend in stage diff — pure constants change

bugs.description: next/image returns 404 for FALLBACK_LISTINGS unsplash image on homepage (photo-1582407947304-fd86f28320c5) — pre-existing, unsplash URL itself 404s; fallback data only shows when API fails
bugs.consoleOutput: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 ()

bugs.description: next/image returns 400 for one S3 article image on /news (Reasons-why-should-you-consult article) — S3 object itself returns 200 so this is a pre-existing next/image optimisation issue; article page still renders
bugs.consoleOutput: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 400 ()

summary: auto-shipped, confidence=90 — ISR TTLs tuned on 10 pages, search fixed to force-dynamic

stageHistory.summary: Tuned ISR TTLs on 10 page files + fixed search dynamic=force-dynamic

loopContext.designRouteReason: No UI changes — caching constants only; designer not needed.

contextGaps.missing: Caching strategy: all data-backed pages under src/app/[locale]/ use `export const revalidate` (ISR), auth-gated/admin use `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'`. Slug detail fetchers in src/lib/api.ts are wrapped in React.cache() to dedupe generateMetadata + page render. Do not add `generateStaticParams` to slug routes — inventory churn makes pre-gen unhelpful.
